Title: Official Clerk JavaScript SDKs: Middleware-based route protection bypass
Description:
`createRouteMatcher` in `@clerk/nextjs`, `@clerk/nuxt`, and `@clerk/astro` can be bypassed by certain crafted requests, allowing them to skip middleware gating and reach downstream handlers.

Sessions are not compromised and no existing user can be impersonated - the bypass only affects the middleware-level gating decision.
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 5.0.0 before 5.7.6, all versions starting from 6.0.0-snapshot.vb87a27f before 6.39.2, all versions starting from 7.0.0 before 7.2.1
NotImpacted: All versions before 5.0.0, all versions starting from 5.7.6 before 6.0.0-snapshot.vb87a27f, all versions starting from 6.39.2 before 7.0.0, all versions starting from 7.2.1
